content: Bug in email_actions.rs perform_approval and perform_rejection: SQL queries used `WHERE invoice_id = $2 AND status = 'pending'` which updated ALL pending approval_requests for an invoice when one approver clicked their email link. This completely bypassed the multi-approver aggregation logic in resolve_invoice_approval_status (which counts remaining pending requests) because it always saw zero pending. Fixed by adding `AND requested_from->>'user_id' = $4` to scope the update to just the clicking user's request, matching the pattern used in mobile.rs (lines 541, 593). Also added tenant_id filter for multi-tenant isolation.
summary: Fixed email_actions.rs approval queries updating ALL pending requests instead of just the user's request
